full_text:
Ren Fan 任籓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ren Fan (任籓)was born in Hedong. Was involved in petitioning for Cao Cao to be made Duke. Ren Fan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
